title: HAZARDOUS WASTE DISPOSAL AND SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM - 211info
text: METRO SOUTH TRANSFER STATION HAZARDOUS WASTE DISPOSAL AND SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hazardous waste disposal site. Accepts sharp objects including needles, acupuncture needles, lancets, syringes, paint, motor oil, antifreeze, other automotive fluids, light bulbs, household cleaners, batteries, and more. 35 gallon limit per day. 2001 Washington Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-4pm (503) 234-3000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 234-3000 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None (businesses must apply for permit) DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Hazardous Materials Collection Sites Sharps Disposal Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. METRO SOUTH TRANSFER STATION
